name: Arsenio Hall
bio: Arsenio Hall is an American comedian, actor, and talk-show host who came up through stand-up at the Comedy Store in Los Angeles before hosting the influential late-night syndicated program The Arsenio Hall Show from 1989 to 1994. He co-starred with Eddie Murphy in Coming to America and returned to stand-up with the 2019 Netflix special Smart and Classy.

timeline.ev: Netflix stand-up special Smart and Classy

accolades: Emmy nominations for The Arsenio Hall Show

bits.t: Why Arsenio Checks His Phone Before His Wife Can See
